acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor % impairment via AMA; pays ongoing.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Doctor assigns impairment percentage using AMA guides; translates to weekly benefits for life or lump sum.[1][2] Key factors: Objective medical exam. Practical guidance: Dispute low ratings via independent eval; attorney negotiates. Covers lost capacity.[1] Higher % = more payout.[2]
